name: dina-workspace
description: Dina home-node-lite TypeScript workspace (shared pure packages + Node server app; mobile lands in Phase 1 per docs/HOME_NODE_LITE_TASKS.md option c).

scripts.test: if find packages apps/home-node-lite apps/mobile -maxdepth 2 -name package.json 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then npm test --workspaces --if-present; else echo 'TS workspace is empty — npm test skipped. (Phase 1 will populate packages/.)'; fi
scripts.generate: openapi-typescript api/core-api.yaml -o packages/protocol/src/gen/core-api.d.ts && openapi-typescript api/brain-api.yaml -o packages/protocol/src/gen/brain-api.d.ts
scripts.generate:check: npm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/protocol/src/gen/
